subcodes.title: Words to Mary MacNutt et al in 1904
subcodes.first_line: There are different kinds or degrees of love: First, from God to God... Fifth, from man to himself. If this is simply selfish it is disastrous to the soul
subcodes.subjects: @four; five pathways of love, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence, @love of God, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @unity; oneness of humanity
